questions.question: What is the primary reason for the escalating need for strategic information in an organization?
options: B) Failure of past decision-support systems
questions.explanation: The rapidly changing business environment makes it difficult for organizations to make informed decisions using outdated information.

questions.question: What is the main characteristic of a good decision-support system?
questions.explanation: A good decision-support system is able to support decision-making by providing relevant and timely information.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a failure of a past decision-support system?
options: A) A company using a new software
B) A company not using data analytics
C) A company not having a data warehouse
questions.explanation: All of the above are examples of failures of past decision-support systems, as they may not be using data analytics or a data warehouse to support decision-making.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a data warehouse?
questions.explanation: The primary function of a data warehouse is to support business intelligence by providing a centralized repository of data for analysis and reporting.

questions.question: What is the main benefit of a data warehouse?
questions.explanation: All of the above are benefits of a data warehouse, as it provides a centralized repository of data, supports business intelligence, and enables organizations to make informed decisions.
